title: Coppice Strong Rectangular Aluminium Foil Tray for Air Fryer, Roasting, Grilling, BBQ & Food Storage | Freezer, Microwave & Oven Safe | 20cm x 13cm x 4cm (10 Containers)
features: VERSATILE: These rectangular foil containers are perfect for use in your air fryer, keeping your basket free from grease and for baking, reheating, or grilling in either the oven or microwave. Great for meal prep, your dish can be assembled, stored in the fridge or freezer, and then cooked or reheated as necessary

DURABLE: Our ‘Smoothwall’ range offers premium design and performance in a stronger and more rigid product than regular foil containers whilst retaining the lightweight and disposable benefits of aluminium. They are easy to clean and attractive on your kitchen worksurfaces

FOOD-SAFE ALUMINIUM: Our aluminium trays remain rigid in the oven and offer high levels of heat resistance (up to 350°C) and retention. Made of high grade, food safe aluminium with sturdy walls and base, they are light and stack-able when not in use for easy storage

DIMENSIONS: The pack contains 10 foil trays and each tray measures 20cm x 13cm x 4cm. This product is also available from us in packs of 20. Please see our store page for a range of sizes and also packs including lids
SUSTAINABLE: Made by the UK’s No.1 foil manufacturer in our South Wales factory from 100% recyclable aluminium foil, they can either be disposed of in the recycling or washed out and used again
description: Product Description Aluminium foil trays, platters and containers Made in our UK factory, the Coppice range of foil products are versatile and suitable for any occasion. Batch cooking for the freezer, catering a special occasion or using your BBQ, Coppice have a foil for you. Baking, grilling, air frying, transporting, and reheating are all made easier with our trays, platters, pie dishes and containers. Previous page Foil Trays For all your baking and grilling needs. A range of sizes and strengths to suit any occasion Foil Platters Perfect for catering events and occasions. In a variety of shape, size and colours Pie and Tart Pans Deep or shallow, large or small, we have the pan to take your pie and tart game to the next level Foil Containers With lids and without and in a variety of depths, foil containers are great for reheating your food Coloured Foils Liven up your dinner table with our range of coloured roasting trays, serving dishes and platters Next page 1 Trays 2 Platters 3 Pies 4 Containers 5 Coloured UK based foil manufacturer In our factory in South Wales, we are on a mission to reduce waste, improve efficiency and maintain the highest levels of quality. Safe to use with food At Coppice we only use quality aluminium when manufacturing our products. Aluminium is taint and odour-free, making it a great choice to use for food. Heat resistant to 350°C Coppice Aluminium foil products are great for heating things up but also stop your food cooling down too quickly. Wash and use again Once you've finished with the product, it can either be disposed of or washed out and used again. What type of foil do I need? Smoothwall Premium Strong Our Smoothwall 'strong' foils are a premium product that will stand repeated use. Attractive and robust they sit between disposable foils and traditional bake wear. They can also be coloured to add style and flair to your table settings and food presentation. Wrinklewall Regular Wrinklewall containers are generally cheaper but no less robust and are an excellent solution for mass catering and business needs. A great quality product. Suitable for Microwaves and Air Fryers Foil trays can be used in most modern microwaves (if constructed since 1983). Just make sure the tray does not come in contact with the walls and that only one tray at a time is used. Easy! Experience effortless cooking with foil trays in your air fryer. Enjoy even heat distribution, easy clean up, and delicious results every time. Elevate your culinary game today.
